contract_claim: `docker ping` is not a valid Docker CLI subcommand. It will always fail with a non-zero exit code, making the primary daemon check ineffective. Only the fallback `docker ps` (L83–90) actually tests daemon liveness.
observed_behavior: `docker ping` is not a valid Docker CLI subcommand. It will always fail with a non-zero exit code, making the primary daemon check ineffective. Only the fallback `docker ps` (L83–90) actually tests daemon liveness.
